channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Author-Intoduction
item.description:
• Introduction

Hi,

I am Sameer Khan . I am currently studying at Azim Premji University where I am pursuing Bsc. Information Science (Honour). In this current semester we are learning how to manage the information and analyse it. For this purpose we have therotical classes and we also do the practical LAB SESSIONS on every wednesday for 3 hours.
